chalets.name: Pinecrest Lodge
chalets.description: Cozy mid-range chalet a short walk from the ski lifts, with a private hot tub and fireplace, ideal for small groups.

chalets.name: Snowberry Retreat
chalets.description: Spacious chalet with hot tub and sauna, perfect for families looking for comfort close to the slopes.

chalets.name: Moose Trail Cabin
chalets.description: Rustic wood cabin with private hot tub and wood-burning fireplace, located on a quiet forest trail.

chalets.name: Budget Nest Chalet
chalets.description: Compact but comfortable chalet with a private hot tub, ideal for budget-conscious groups.

chalets.name: Evergreen Grande Chalet
chalets.description: Large, upscale family chalet with sauna and hot tub, designed for extended family stays and groups.

chalets.name: Riverbend Family Chalet
chalets.description: Family-oriented chalet along the river with a private sauna and kids’ bunk room.

chalets.name: Peakview Chalet
chalets.description: Modern ski-in/ski-out chalet with panoramic peak views and a rooftop hot tub.

chalets.name: Lakeside Hideaway
chalets.description: Tranquil lakeside chalet a short drive from the resort, ideal for couples and small families.

chalets.name: Husky Hollow Cabin
chalets.description: Pet-friendly cabin with fenced yard and hot tub, popular with dog owners.

chalets.name: Summit Ridge Lodge
chalets.description: Luxury lodge at the top of the ridge with private spa area, sauna, and hot tub.

chalets.name: Foxfire Loft
chalets.description: Stylish loft-style chalet near the village center, ideal for a couple or small group.

chalets.name: Wintergreen Meadows
chalets.description: Bright chalet overlooking open meadows with a private sauna and large deck.

chalets.name: Birchwood Nook
chalets.description: Simple studio-style chalet suited to solo travelers or couples, walking distance to the lifts.

chalets.name: Glacier Point Lodge
chalets.description: Premium chalet with spa-style bathrooms, sauna, and hot tub, minutes from the main gondola.

payment_methods.description: Pay securely with Visa, Mastercard, or American Express.
Use your PayPal balance or linked bank account.
Fast checkout with Apple Pay on supported devices.
Pay quickly with Google Pay (currently limited availability).

stay_extras.name: Airport transfer (round trip)
stay_extras.description: Private round-trip transfer between the airport and your chalet for your whole group.

stay_extras.name: Airport transfer (one way)
stay_extras.description: Private one-way transfer between the airport and your chalet.

stay_extras.name: Daily breakfast
stay_extras.description: Buffet-style breakfast served each morning of your stay.

stay_extras.name: Late checkout
stay_extras.description: Extend your checkout time to 2:00 PM on departure day, subject to availability.

store_categories.name: Groceries & Essentials
store_categories.description: Fridge-stocking groceries, beverages, and everyday essentials for your stay.

store_categories.name: Breakfast
store_categories.description: Cereals, eggs, pastries, and other breakfast favorites ready for your chalet fridge.

store_categories.name: Dinner & Ready meals
store_categories.description: Hearty prepared mains and sides you can heat and serve after a day on the slopes.

store_categories.name: Snacks
store_categories.description: Chips, chocolate, trail mixes, and other snacks for movie and game nights.

store_categories.name: Clothing & Accessories
store_categories.description: Winter clothing, ski gloves, beanies, and thermal layers.

store_categories.name: Fireplace & Comfort
store_categories.description: Firewood, matches, and cozy comforts for evenings by the fire.

store_categories.name: Candles & Ambience
store_categories.description: Candles, lanterns, and ambience enhancers for a warm chalet atmosphere.

store_categories.name: Games & Entertainment
store_categories.description: Board games, cards, and entertainment for all group sizes.

store_categories.name: Gift cards & Vouchers
store_categories.description: Digital chalet stay gift cards you can send by email.

products.name: Free-range Eggs (Dozen)
products.description: One dozen free-range large eggs, perfect for scrambled eggs, omelets, or baking during your stay.

products.name: Granola & Berries Yogurt Parfait
products.description: Individual parfait with creamy yogurt, crunchy granola, and mixed berries. Ready to grab from the fridge.

products.name: Buttermilk Pancake Mix
products.description: Family-size buttermilk pancake mix, just add water or milk for an easy chalet breakfast.

products.name: Fresh Croissants (4-pack)
products.description: Four buttery croissants baked the morning of delivery, ideal for simple chalet breakfasts.

products.name: Beef Lasagna Family Tray
products.description: Oven-ready beef lasagna tray that serves 43 after a long day on the slopes.

products.name: Vegetable Stir-fry with Rice
products.description: Colorful mixed vegetable stir-fry with jasmine rice in a heat-and-serve tray.

products.name: Three-cheese Mac & Cheese Bake
products.description: Rich three-cheese macaroni bake in a shareable tray, ideal for cozy nights in.

products.name: Trail Mix Mountain Blend
products.description: Hearty trail mix of nuts, seeds, and dried fruit, great for day packs or movie nights.

products.name: Kettle-cooked Sea Salt Chips
products.description: Crispy kettle-cooked potato chips seasoned with sea salt.

products.name: Dark Chocolate Almond Bar
products.description: Premium dark chocolate bar with roasted almonds, individually wrapped.

products.name: Alpine Pro Insulated Ski Gloves (Blue)
products.description: Waterproof, insulated ski gloves with grippy palms and touchscreen-friendly fingertips, in alpine blue.

products.name: Summit Knit Beanie (Blue)
products.description: Soft knit beanie in a deep summit blue color, designed to fit under helmets or hoods.

products.name: Merino Thermal Socks 2-Pack (Blue/Grey)
products.description: Two pairs of merino wool thermal socks in blue and grey, cushioned for long ski days.

products.name: Kiln-dried Firewood Pack
products.description: Bundle of kiln-dried hardwood logs, suitable for one to two evenings by the fireplace.

products.name: Long-stick Safety Matches
products.description: Box of long-stick safety matches, ideal for lighting fireplaces and candles.

products.name: Scented Soy Candle - Winter Pine
products.description: Clean-burning soy candle with a winter pine scent to add cozy ambience to your chalet.

products.name: Summit Strategy Board Game
products.description: Tactical mountain-climbing strategy game for smaller groups, perfect for 2	3 players.

products.name: Party Peaks Trivia Night
products.description: Lively trivia party game themed around mountains, travel, and pop culture for larger groups.

products.name: Alpine Solo Card Adventure
products.description: Compact solo/duo card game for quiet evenings by the fire, easy to learn in minutes.

products.name: Digital Chalet Stay Gift Card
products.description: Flexible-value digital gift card redeemable towards chalet stays and in-store purchases. Delivered by email.

bookings.special_requests: Please have the hot tub pre-heated by 7pm on arrival day.
High floor if possible and a late check-in around 9pm.
Traveling with a small dog; please provide pet bowl and crate if available.
If available, please place a note on the file that we may add airport transfer and breakfast later.
